Now I need to make sure the `.col-toggle-item` (now a `<div>` instead of `<label>`) still works properly. The item was changed from `<label>` to `<div>` in the template. Let me also make sure the label click still toggles the checkbox. Since the checkbox is inside the div and we have explicit event handlers, this should work fine. But let me verify the `<label>` → `<div>` change doesn't break the toggle — the click handler on the checkbox `change` event should be fine since we're clicking directly on the switch.

Actually, previously it was a `<label>` wrapping the whole thing, which means clicking anywhere on the row would toggle the checkbox. Now that we changed to `<div>`, clicking the label text won't toggle the checkbox anymore. This is actually better since we have dragging on the row — we don't want accidental toggling during drag. The user clicks the toggle switch specifically.
